context: You expect to pay your loan in the next upcoming month and you have started planning ahead, yet you hope someone can just give you 25 000$ to forget about it.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to B — his openness about his child’s surgery created a strong emotional bond and a mutual determination to win for our families. I also connected closely with F and J: F because we established a clear wrist‑tap signal and a practical probing/coverage plan, and J because our plan to pass the opener, mirror moves, and use a double‑tap table signal gave me tactical confidence. The person I felt least connected to was D; we agreed on a subtle nod and quiet probing but I didn’t feel the same personal rapport or warmth there.

Yes — I made several specific agreements: a proportional split and record‑keeping plan with C, wrist‑tap coordination with F, a double‑tap table signal and mirroring with J, and a subtle nod with D. I trust B, F, and J going into the game and will rely on our signals; I’m cautious around D and will watch them closely, though I haven’t labeled anyone outright untrustworthy.
